settings.subtitle: Gentle Cleansing + pH Balance
settings.description: A deep-cleansing yet gentle formula that removes impurities without stripping moisture. Perfect for a refreshing daily cleanse that leaves skin feeling soft and balanced.

settings.label: GOOD FOR:
settings.value: All skin types, especially sensitive or dry skin

settings.label: FEELS LIKE:
settings.value: A light, airy foam that rinses cleanly off the skin

settings.label: LOOKS LIKE:
settings.value: Clarified, fresh-looking skin with a natural glow

settings.label: SMELLS LIKE:
settings.value: A clean, revitalizing scent with hints of tea tree and citrus

settings.title: A purifying cleanser for CLEAR + BALANCED skin.
centella asiatica extract
settings.description: known for its skin-soothing properties that calm redness and inflammation during cleansing

settings.title: mild amino acid surfactants
settings.description: gentle cleansing agents that effectively remove dirt while respecting the skin's barrier

settings.title: what's inside
settings.intro: Formulated with sensitive skin in mind to provide a powerful yet non-irritating daily cleanse.
settings.footer_text: also made with GLYCERIN, HYALURONIC ACID, GREEN TEA EXTRACT, ALLANTOIN, AND ALOE VERA

settings.description: SAID THEIR SKIN FELT CLEAN WITHOUT DRYNESS
SAID IT EFFECTIVELY REMOVED ALL DAYTIME IMPURITIES
REPORTED CALMER AND LESS IRRITATED SKIN AFTER USE

settings.footnote: Based on a 4-week consumer perception study with twice-daily use.

settings.question: Can I use this as a makeup remover?
settings.answer: Yes, while gentle, it effectively removes light makeup and daily sunscreen.

settings.question: Is it drying for sensitive skin?
settings.answer: No, it's formulated with a skin-mimicking pH to maintain your natural moisture barrier.

settings.question: Does it contain soap?
settings.answer: No, it is soap-free and sulfate-free to minimize any potential irritation.
